title: Share Files uploaded in the Files Column

posts.author: RobertoRoldan (Roberto Roldán)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a board with files in the file column, but I need to share those files with someona that is on the board as an element, I have de email and all the info but if I try to share those files, the person needs to have a Monday account, because the share link request so. Will you in the future open a possibility that files uploaded and the link that Monday creates allows to open the file or at least allow a direct download without the sistem request the person to have a Monday account?
